---
title: "Tables"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))
```

```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(stringi)
```

```{r load-data}
lit <- read_csv("data/raw/literature_dataset.csv") %>%
  select(ID, Title, Authors, Year)

paper_classif <- read_csv("output/paperClassifYear.csv")

surveys_raw <- read_delim(
  "data/raw/survey_classification.csv",
  delim     = ";",
  show_col_types = FALSE,
  locale    = locale(encoding = "UTF-8")
)
```

```{r build-table}
# paperClassifYear is long format (one row per paper x category x country)
# collapse to one row per paper
paper_summary <- paper_classif %>%
  group_by(ID) %>%
  summarise(
    Country  = paste(sort(unique(country)), collapse = "; "),
    Category = paste(sort(unique(category)), collapse = "; "),
    .groups  = "drop"
  )

table_papers <- lit %>%
  inner_join(paper_summary, by = "ID") %>%
  select(Title, Authors, Year, Country, Category) %>%
  arrange(Year, Authors)
```

```{r write-outputs}
dir.create("figures/tables", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Escape special LaTeX characters in text columns
escape_latex <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub("&",  "\\\\&",  x)
  x <- gsub("%",  "\\\\%",  x)
  x <- gsub("\\$", "\\\\$", x)
  x <- gsub("#",  "\\\\#",  x)
  x <- gsub("_",  "\\\\_",  x)
  x <- gsub("\\{", "\\\\{", x)
  x <- gsub("\\}", "\\\\}", x)
  x <- gsub("~",  "\\\\textasciitilde{}", x)
  x <- gsub("\\^", "\\\\textasciicircum{}", x)
  x
}

tex_tbl <- table_papers %>%
  # Remove bracketed portions containing CJK characters (translated subtitles)
  mutate(Title = gsub("\\s*;?\\s*\\[[^\\]]*\\p{Han}[^\\]]*\\]", "", Title, perl = TRUE)) %>%
  # Transliterate all remaining non-ASCII characters (Cyrillic, accented, etc.) to ASCII
  mutate(across(c(Title, Authors, Country, Category),
                ~ stri_trans_general(.x, "Any-Latin; Latin-ASCII"))) %>%
  # Strip any residual non-ASCII characters that survive transliteration
  mutate(across(c(Title, Authors, Country, Category),
                ~ gsub("[^\x01-\x7F]", "", .x))) %>%
  mutate(across(c(Title, Authors, Country, Category), escape_latex))

tex_body <- kable(
  tex_tbl,
  format    = "latex",
  booktabs  = TRUE,
  longtable = TRUE,
  col.names = c("Title", "Authors", "Year", "Country", "Category"),
  caption   = "Included papers with country and category assignments",
  label     = "papers"
)

tex_body <- sub(
  "(\\\\begin\\{longtable\\})(\\[[^]]*\\])?\\{[^}]+\\}",
  "\\1[t]{p{6cm}p{3cm}lp{3cm}p{3cm}}",
  tex_body
)

writeLines(
  c("{\\fontsize{8}{10}\\selectfont", tex_body, "}"),
  "figures/tables/Table_papers.tex"
)

# CSV for reference
write_csv(table_papers, "figures/tables/Table_papers.csv")

cat("Wrote figures/tables/Table_papers.tex and Table_papers.csv\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(table_papers), "\n")
```

```{r build-survey-table}
cat_cols <- c("Perceptions", "Behavior", "Policy", "Health", "Priority")

table_surveys <- surveys_raw %>%
  filter(Inclusion == 1) %>%
  mutate(
    # Combine current year and prior repeated-measure years into one string
    Years = if_else(
      is.na(repeatedMeasure) | repeatedMeasure == "",
      as.character(year),
      paste(
        sort(unique(as.integer(
          strsplit(paste(year, repeatedMeasure, sep = "; "), "; ")[[1]]
        ))),
        collapse = "; "
      )
    ),
    Category = apply(
      pick(all_of(cat_cols)), 1,
      function(row) paste(cat_cols[row == 1], collapse = "; ")
    )
  ) %>%
  select(Question = question, Program = source, Years, Countries = surveyedCountries, Category) %>%
  arrange(Program, Years)
```

```{r write-survey-outputs}
tex_survey <- table_surveys %>%
  mutate(across(c(Question, Program, Years, Countries, Category), escape_latex))

tex_body_survey <- kable(
  tex_survey,
  format    = "latex",
  booktabs  = TRUE,
  longtable = TRUE,
  col.names = c("Question", "Program", "Years", "Countries", "Category"),
  caption   = "Included survey items with program, years, countries, and category",
  label     = "surveys"
)

tex_body_survey <- sub(
  "(\\\\begin\\{longtable\\})(\\[[^]]*\\])?\\{[^}]+\\}",
  "\\1[t]{p{6cm}lp{2cm}p{4cm}p{2.5cm}}",
  tex_body_survey
)

writeLines(
  c("{\\fontsize{8}{10}\\selectfont", tex_body_survey, "}"),
  "figures/tables/Table_surveys.tex"
)

write_csv(table_surveys, "figures/tables/Table_surveys.csv")

cat("Wrote figures/tables/Table_surveys.tex and Table_surveys.csv\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(table_surveys), "\n")
```
